guardrails.note: Read-only popular prompt approval bridge. It finds safe candidate drafts for popular AI prompt lanes that are not already in the human approval execution queue.
guardrails.stopBefore: Stop before mark:review and publish. Human approval is required for every candidate.

sourceEvidence.trafficNote: No traffic, ranking, impression, click, conversion, or revenue claim is made.

commandBoundary.stopBefore: Run mark:review only after explicit human approval. Publish dry-run only after review. Publish confirm is not included.
